_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PELICAN PANEL
name: Farming Simulator 25
author: custom@example.com
description: Farming Simulator 25 Dedicated Server via Wine + SteamCMD. Benoetigt Steam-Account mit FS25-Lizenz (App: 2300320).

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

# SteamCMD
cd /tmp
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl lib32gcc-s1 2>/dev/null || true
curl -fsSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar -xz

# FS25 herunterladen (App 2300320)
./steamcmd.sh \
  +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
  +login "${STEAM_USER}" "${STEAM_PASS}" \
  +app_update 2300320 validate \
  +quit

# Steam AppID-Fix (verhindert Popup beim Start)
echo '2300320' > /mnt/server/steam_appid.txt

# Default Config
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/dedicatedServer.xml ]; then
cat > /mnt/server/dedicatedServer.xml << XMLEOF
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" standalone="no"?>
<gameserver>
  <settings>
    <game_name>${SERVER_NAME:-FS25 Server}</game_name>
    <game_password>${SERVER_PASSWORD:-}</game_password>
    <admin_password>${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-ChangeMe123}</admin_password>
    <port>${SERVER_PORT:-10823}</port>
    <save_game_index>1</save_game_index>
    <map_id>MapUS</map_id>
    <language>de</language>
    <crossplay_allowed>true</crossplay_allowed>
    <max_players>${MAX_PLAYERS:-16}</max_players>
  </settings>
  <initial_admin>
    <username>${ADMIN_USER:-admin}</username>
    <passphrase>${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-ChangeMe123}</passphrase>
  </initial_admin>
</gameserver>
XMLEOF
fi
